review_title: Great features, easy to use, and great customer service
description: Overall it's been a great experience! Easy to use, easy to roll out, easy to set up logins, and, when we've ever needed help we've received quick responses from support. [sensitvie content hidden] is someone who has helped in the past and she was great!
author: Patricia P.
pros: The PTO Tracking feature. Employee directory. Org chart function
cons: I can't think of anything that I don't like.

review_title: Affordable and easy to use!
description: Before we started using Built for Teams, our PTO was just managed through a Google spreadsheet. Having a service like Built to track people's hours and requests has been a load off of those team members that were previously responsible for handling that. When I first decided to find a service for us to use, I did a couple of trials and demos with different companies. I was impressed immediately by the customer service provided to me. The demo was great and all follow-up conversation was responsive and helpful.
author: Heather R.
pros: I love how simple it was to set up and how easy it is to use. We only need it for the most basic PTO management services, so we don't need to be in there often, nor do we need to use a lot of the features, but it does everything we need it to do and our team had no problems understanding or adopting it.
cons: There are a few kinks we run into here and there. Just some things that don't behave the way I expected them to, but it was always easy to get around them or figure them out with no issues. So it's not a huge con, that's for sure. The Slack integration could be a bit more intuitive, but I know it's in beta so I assume it'll advance more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It serves the purpose for now
description: It serves the purpose at the moment because our ERP capability is lacking
author: Anna S.
pros: the price, ease of use, ability to allow managers to use
cons: not being able to save proposed org charts, tiny font on pdfs

review_title: Making taking time off even easier!
description: I have used Built for Teams for last two years for myself and my team. I am extremely happy with its functionality and ease of use.
author: Amulya S.
pros: The simplicity of the software is the best aspect. Taking time off and recording time away from work should not be complicated. Built for Teams makes it easier and hassle-free.
cons: The only con that I would mention will be the "Time Approval" functionality in the Mobile App. It needs to be more user-friendly Everything else is very streamlined and user-friendly.

review_title: Review
author: Rachel H.
pros: - ability to quickly access information in one place - can approve vacation from the email without login - convenience
cons: - it is one more thing to log into - employees often don't use it making it ineffect

review_title: It's exactly what we needed!
description: As the administrator for PTO and Payroll, this software has really made my life easier. It's so easy to track everyone's PTO - and to have multiple policies! We had to grandfather a few employees on the older PTO plan when the company moved to accrual, and it was extremely easy to do so. The employees are able to visually see when they've taken off in the past, in case they couldn't remember. All in all, very happy!
author: Haley S.
pros: I liked that the software itself was very easy to learn for the administrator and user side. There are several reporting functionalities as well. If there was anything I had a question about, or if there was anything additionally needed from the software, the support team was always very willing to help accomplish those tasks!
cons: It only recorded in half hour increments. I've had a few employees inquire about 15 minute increments, but this isn't a huge problem.

review_title: A great PTO platform
description: One of my best business investments was this one. It completes the task and is economical. I adore how people can check their own accounts, which reduces calls and laborious tracking.
author: Chandrakeerthan P.
pros: I loved how simple it was for both administrators and users to learn the software itself. Many reporting features are available as well. The support staff was always more than happy to help me with any questions I had or any additional requirements I had for the software.
cons: The Time Approval feature of the mobile app is the only drawback I can think of. It should be easier to use. The rest of it is quite user-friendly and well-organized.

review_title: BFT Review
description: I enjoy the software for the most part but I wish these changes would be made.
author: Kayla P.
pros: The easy functionality for our employees. They are able to log-in and request time off/put in for sick time, etc. It is helpful because it isn't something I have to manually enter anymore.
cons: I dislike the request process. I would prefer that it would allow you to go down to the minute so it's easier tracked. I would also prefer it had the option to mark for tardiness. I use the unpaid tab for that but you have to modify the balance every time. I also dislike that you cannot modify something once it's put in/date passed. I shouldn't have to e-mail for adjustments - I should be able to change them as I'm the admin.

review_title: Excellent PTO Tracking for Mid-Size Business
author: Jeffrey K.
pros: Excellent value. It is very easy to use. Intuitive interface. PTO tracking allows full customization of policies and multiple policies based on length of service or employee classification. Has enough capabilities to grow with our organization.
cons: Wish it had employee time tracking. Additionally, I wish it were easier to move between active and former employees. It would make sense to have a drop down with employee status rather than a multi-step filter.

review_title: Experience with both the product and customer services has been wonderful.
author: BJ O.
pros: Ease of use and features. Built for teams has been easy to work with. They also have great customer support in providing us with both direction and implementation assistance.
cons: Lack of API or integration has been a challenge to allow integration with some of the leading ERP systems that we support.

review_title: Simplify your life - Use Built for Teams
description: Its easier to request time off, by being able to see co-workers scheduled request, so there's no conflict. I like being able to use this any time of day. Just sign in and it takes just a few minutes to complete.
author: Regina J.
pros: I like the most about the Programs is very easy to use. Simple to edit changes. Keeps track of hours used and available. Separates time off in categories, ex. PTO, Sick, Bereavement, etc... Sends email messages to approver to review time off requested.
cons: What I least like about the software is: I don't use the Analytic portion. No need to receive the weekly emails on my working time progress. Sometimes not sure if hours calculated correctly one submitted for time off. Numbers don't always match. Would like to be able to cancel request for time off, if plans change instead of contacting Administrator to do so. The titles of "Reason for requesting time off" & write a description of why requesting time off - seems redundant. Perhaps only one option is needed.

review_title: Streamlined PTO Process
description: Built for Teams has been great! You can't go wrong choosing it.
author: Danielle C.
pros: Built for Teams has helped our Organization efficiently process and track PTO. There are no more lost PTO paper requests. Employees can easily request PTO and the request goes directly to their manager to approve or deny. At any given time, employees can see how many hours they have remaining for PTO. Organizationally, every staff member can see who is off work on a particular day, there's no more wondering if someone is working or not. From a HR perspective, we can easily track PTO hours used and remaining for each employee. Built for Teams is user friendly and intuitive to use. The couple of times I have had questions, Customer Service has quickly been there to solve the issue for.
cons: I love everything about Built for Teams. As the person initially setting up Built for Teams, it was time consuming. However, that is to be expected with any new application. It was not difficult, just tedious to get everything set-up correctly. Once it was set-up, it has been running like a well oiled machine.

review_title: Easy Managing of Employee Vacations and Time Off.
description: As a small business it is challenging when people are out of the office. Before BFT we utilized Outlook to manage vacations and other out of office items. The problems was that anyone could edit the calendar so we had no idea if the time off was approved by management or not. We also had no easy way to track the total time off an employee was taking. With BFT all employees must make requests to management. Management can view the amount of time they already took off and decide to approve or deny the request. This ensures that employees do not take more time off then they are allowed.
author: Scott G.
pros: When an employee requests time off for various reasons they can easily send a request using the BFT application on their desktop. The request shows up in my inbox and I can approve or deny with one click. Before I approve it however the request shows any already approved vacation conflicts. The online calendar syncs with Outlook so I can see at a glance upcoming vacations. I also like that you can add additional categories other than Vacation. This gives the employee options on how to use their allotted time.
cons: At the moment I have not found any issues with the software.

review_title: Great Tool
description: We use this to track all of our PTO. We have multiple categories we allow our employees to use, and BFT accommodates all of them, which I haven't found in other software.
author: Jennifer P.
pros: My favorite aspect of BFT is its ease of use. From an admin perspective, it's easy to set up accounts and make changes, and our employees never ask questions about how to do something.
cons: I think it would be convenient to allow employees to cancel their requests.

review_title: Built For Teams brought order to our PTO policy chaos
description: We're a small eCommerce company with a headcount of 15. When the team was smaller, paid time-off wasn't being tracked which led to concerns about abuse of the policy and a lack of transparency around who would be out of the office and when. It became necessary to put a tool in place to better handle PTO requests and tracking, but a traditional HRIS would have been overkill for a company our size. Built For Teams allowed me to implement a robust, yet easy-to-use system that didn't cause any headaches for employees and gave managers greater visibility over when each member of their team would be unavailable.
author: Colin R.
pros: - The UI incorporates best practices so very little training is needed to get new users comfortable with the system; the user experience is very logical. - The shared calendar can be set to allow employees and managers to view others' approved PTO dates to ensure adequate coverage before a new PTO request is made.
cons: - The system can be used to warehouse a lot of employee data that we don't keep in Built (tax info, direct deposit info, benefits data not related to PTO) and the inclusion of those fields can sometimes cause confusion for new employees.

review_title: Finally the Right Product!
description: This was one of my best business purchases. It is cost effective and gets the job done. I love that the users can monitor their own account and it cuts down on calls and manually tracking.
author: TANESHA G.
pros: Set it and forget it! The setup was easy, there in no ongoing maintenance, and you just add employees as you go. The available policies are customizable and the administrator can edit as needed. The approval process for PTO is very user friendly. The weekly reminders are very helpful!
cons: Sometimes, I forget to send the initial set-up email to the employee after adding the new hire to the system. This should be automatic. The directory, org chart and people should be intertwined for ease of use; the sections sort of do the same function. When approving time off requests, it allows approve or deny, but sometimes I need space to send feedback.

review_title: Easiest vacation/sick time tracker on the market
description: Built for teams provided a very easy to use, easy to maintain, simple and accurate solution for our company to track sick and vacation time. The customer support is very easy to work with. We absolutely love this product!
author: Doug S.
pros: Best part is how easy it is for our employees to use this product to request paid time off.
cons: For some complex setup items, I did have to call their customer service, but they quickly fixed what I was looking for.

review_title: Excellent product for Time Off tracking
description: Very positive experience with Built for Teams.
author: Jim B.
pros: Easy to use, good reporting, very affordable
cons: Some reports are not intuitive (most are), and take a moment to learn. This may be more due to the once-a-year nature for those particular reports.

review_title: Quality Product with Room for improvement
description: Convenience of keeping track of my personal pto, versus maintaining a spreadsheet on my own. And having to hassle HR to make sure I'm accumulating correctly on a regular basis.
author: Jennifer H.
pros: Ease of use, ability to see the addition of PTO hours, submitted hours, and pending hours is well laid out and easy to follow.
cons: Would appreciate the ability to set up reminder emails for pto hours added, or total hours accumulated. Or a statement of activity on a quarterly basis so the possibility of hours not accruing once they've reached the maximum limit.

review_title: Built for teams review
author: Vitor L.
pros: Very user friendly and intuitive. Even without train is very acessable and very helpfull for HR management.
cons: Not posible to track individual information and more custom options,

review_title: Built For Teams Exceptional Software
author: Michael A.
pros: The PTO request and tracking feature is simple and user friendly for all of our crews to use and complex enough to allow us to create unique PTO accrual categories and track employee information.
cons: The only con we had found so far with this system dealt with the ability to track certifications and licenses. Built diligently worked on finding a solution for that and has recently released the a new feature that resolves that concern.

review_title: easy to use!
author: Uri H.
pros: I love how easy it is to request time off and see everyone's schedule
cons: everything has been great so far...maybe that you can't see all of the names on the calendar when someone requests a day off?

review_title: Great software to track employees' remote and PTO days
author: Anish S.
pros: I love having a single place to request remote and vacation days as well as see when other team members will be remote or out of the office. It is equally as useful to see how much time I have PTO time I have remaining in a given year.
cons: There's nothing I don't like about this software, but if anything, it would be nice to have additional features like having a place to view current HR policies.

review_title: Highly Satisfied
description: Simplified our process for scheduling and tracking employee time away.
author: John G.
pros: Ease of use for scheduling and tracking employee time away.
cons: Minor inability for employees to cancel scheduled time away after it has already been approved.

review_title: Built for Teams is the BEST PTO tracking website
description: We were searching for software/a website that would enable us to keep PTO updated and accurate (we do not have many hourly employees and most other websites/software include hours worked, not just PTO). Built for Teams has enabled us to do this with ease. Employees are able to login and request for time off and supervisors are then able to go in and either approve or deny the request. Payroll is then able to run reports based on date and have easy access to who used what PTO during a pay period and then enter it into our accounting software to double check that the remaining hours for each employee are accurate. Built for Teams has been a huge asset to tracking PTO in our company! Also, the team behind Built for Teams is VERY responsive to and questions that we have had. They are quick to respond and very helpful!
author: SHANNON D.
pros: The best part of Built for Teams is the ease of use and that it ONLY tracks PTO, not hours worked by employees.
cons: Nothing....it's great! I can't say anything negative about this product
